name: deskrun
description: A polished Windows 11 launcher built with Tauri and SolidJS.

scripts.clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cargo clean --manifest-path 'src-tauri/Cargo.toml'; if (Test-Path 'dist') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist' }; if (Test-Path 'node_modules/.vite') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'node_modules/.vite' }"
